name: Sue's Quick Oriental Dinner
recipeInstructions:
If rice is not precooked, start the rice. If it is precooked, place 2-3 cups into the microwave to heat.
Put fresh vegetables into a steamer. Filling half the steamer produces a sufficient amount of vegetables. It should take 15-20 minutes to steam.
While the vegetables are steaming, prepare the sauce in a large, coated frying pan. Sauté scallions and ginger in 1-2 tablespoons Sesame Oil.
Prepare the liquids in a measuring cup: 3 tablespoons Sherry, 1/2 cup Stock (vegetable, chicken, or beef consommé), 2 tablespoons Low sodium Tamari, 1 tablespoon sugar. If wine is not available, increase the stock to compensate.
Add the rice and vegetables to the sauce and toss in the large skillet.
Variations: Add tahini, thinned peanut butter, hot chili oil, or a large quantity of garlic. Note that no garlic is used for the basic recipe.
